MODULE: cosmos.core.external_gateway
FILE: cosmos/core/external_gateway.py (732 lines)
CATEGORY: core

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos External Gateway - "The Window"

Sandboxed endpoint for external agents/systems to query the collective.
Heavy rate limiting, full audit trail, secret scrubbing, and kill switch.

Design Principles:
1. NEVER expose: API keys, wallet keys, internal architecture, file paths, memory contents
2. 

CLASSES:
- GatewayRateLimiter: Token bucket rate limiter for the gateway.
  Methods: def is_allowed(self, client_id: str) -> bool
  Methods: def get_retry_after(self, client_id: str) -> float
  Methods: def cleanup_stale(self, max_age_seconds: float=3600.0)
- GatewayClient: Tracks an external client interacting with the gateway.
  Methods: def update_threat(self, score: float)
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- GatewayRequest: Recorded gateway request.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- GatewayResponse: Recorded gateway response.
  Methods: def to_dict(self) -> dict
- ExternalGateway: Sandboxed gateway for external agents to query the Cosmos collective.

All input
  Methods: async def handle_request(self, input_text: str, client_ip: str, user_agent: str='') -> dict
  Methods: async def emergency_shutdown(self)
  Methods: async def enable(self)
  Methods: def block_client(self, client_id: str, reason: str)
  Methods: def unblock_client(self, client_id: str)
  Methods: def get_audit_log(self, last_n: int=100) -> list[dict]
  Methods: def get_stats(self) -> dict

PUBLIC FUNCTIONS:
- def scrub_response(response: str) -> Tuple[str, bool]
- def get_external_gateway() -> ExternalGateway
